Tue, Sep 16, 2025 · 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM CEST

Sclable Business Solutions GmbH

Marc-Aurel-Straße 10-12/Top 10 · Vienna

Second Vienna dbt Meetup with dbt Labs CTO: FabCon Edition (in person)

Hosted by Johannes S. and 2 others

Vienna dbt Meetup
4.7
18 reviews
Details

This dbt Meetup is an opportunity for the local Vienna dbt Community to casually connect and collaborate. If you work with data, this event is for you. We welcome data analysts, scientists, engineers, architects, and more!

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://community.getdbt.com/
Join the conversation in the #local-dach channel in dbt Slack to connect with other data practitioners locally.

🤝 Organizer: b.telligent, dbt & sclable
🏠 Venue: sclable
✨ Agenda & Speakers ✨

18.00: Registration
**** Registration will close at 18.30****

There will be food & drinks to get us started.

18.30: Welcome
b.telligent, dbt & sclable

18.35: Moving from Self-Managed dbt to dbt Cloud
Martin Finn-Sell - Senior Data Scientist @ GoStudent

19.05: What's New from dbt
Mark Porter - CTO @ dbt Labs

19.20: Building Our Internal Data Ecosystem: From Raw Data to Business Insights
Sümeyye Suri - Data Analyst @ sclable
Manfred Krieger - DevOps Specialist @ sclable

19.35: Real-World Success & Roadmap Ahead: Accelerating Analytics with Microsoft Fabric + dbt
Charles Webb - Principal PM Manager - Microsoft Fabric

20.05-21.00: Closing & Networking

dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 40,000 organizations worldwide. With practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently and build trustworthy data for the whole organization. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Note: To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: Health & Safety

Details

This dbt Meetup is an opportunity for the local Vienna dbt Community to casually connect and collaborate. If you work with data, this event is for you. We welcome data analysts, scientists, engineers, architects, and more!

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://community.getdbt.com/

🏠 Venue: MeisterLabs Software GmbH Mariahilfer Str. 97/4, 1060 Wien, Austria
✨ Agenda & Speakers ✨

17.30: Registration
**** Registration will close at 17.55****

18.00: Welcome
b.telligent, dbt & MeisterLabs

18.15: More than just Jinja - dbt Macros
Felix Behrendt - Consultant @ b.telligent

18.45: What's new from dbt

19.00: Meister's Journey to Self-Serve Analytics
Sandra Merkel - Analytics Director @ MeisterLabs

19.30-20.30: Networking
With Food & Drinks

dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 40,000 organizations worldwide.
